positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and geometric star clusters. The composition must be symmetrical and centrally focused, presenting a clean, high-contrast silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Use a deep indigo and emerald green color palette with accents of luminous gold. Style is modern neo-sacred geometry meets Art Nouveau etching, emphasizing crisp linework and dramatic negative space. The overall look should be detailed, mystical, and inherently repeatable.
